articles.title: A space telescope maps ancient galaxies hidden behind cosmic dust
articles.summary: Astronomers used infrared observations to study distant galaxies that were previously obscured by cosmic dust, improving models of early star formation.

articles.title: Arctic warming is reshaping global weather patterns
articles.summary: Researchers found that rapid Arctic temperature increases can shift jet stream behavior, influencing heat waves, storms, and drought conditions far beyond the polar region.

articles.title: Coral reef recovery depends on cooler ocean currents and local biodiversity
articles.summary: A long-term reef survey shows that coral systems recover faster when cooler currents reduce heat stress and nearby marine biodiversity remains high.

articles.title: Microbes in desert soils reveal unexpected strategies for surviving drought
articles.summary: Scientists identified microbial communities that reorganize their metabolism during long dry periods, offering clues about resilience in extreme ecosystems.

articles.title: A nasal vaccine candidate boosts early immune defense against respiratory infection
articles.summary: An experimental vaccine delivered through the nose triggered strong local immune activity in early trials, a promising sign for blocking infection at the point of entry.

articles.title: Brain signal patterns during sleep may strengthen memory recall
articles.summary: Researchers recorded repeating neural activity during sleep and linked the patterns to improved memory recall the next day, shedding light on consolidation mechanisms.

articles.title: New battery chemistry could extend grid-scale energy storage
articles.summary: A prototype battery design uses abundant materials and a stable electrolyte to improve long-duration storage for renewable electricity systems.

articles.title: Flexible semiconductor film bends without losing performance
articles.summary: Engineers created a thin semiconductor layer that remains conductive after repeated bending, opening new options for wearable sensors and compact devices.

articles.title: Laser-driven fusion experiment improves plasma confinement time
articles.summary: A new fusion chamber design kept plasma stable for longer periods, an incremental but meaningful step toward sustained high-energy reactions.

articles.title: Machine learning model helps biologists classify whale calls faster
articles.summary: A compact machine learning system sorted large archives of whale vocalizations, helping marine biologists identify behavioral patterns across seasons.
